title: Friendship
content:
Here's to the four hinges of Friendship -
     Swearing, Lying, Stealing and Drinking.
     When you swear, swear by your country;
     When you lie, lie for a pretty woman,
     When you steal, steal away from bad company
     And when you drink, drink with me.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Friendship", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
